visible_signal_types.description: Foundation-stage permits and enabling work normalized for the platform map.
Environmental, entitlement, and review-stage signals collapsed into one public type.
Crane and lift permitting activity, normalized for equipment demand timing.
Utility and grid-adjacent work collapsed into one public-facing signal type.
Early site readiness, grading, and enabling activity.
Zoning, variance, and entitlement activity normalized into one public type.
Company investment and project-commitment signals normalized for the public map.
Steel package and erection-stage signals normalized for crane demand.
Normalized building-permit activity used as an early project indicator.
Demolition activity surfaced as site turnover and preparation demand.
Excavation and early sitework indicators tied to equipment mobilization.
Concrete pours and close-in-place structural work tied to active build timing.

project_candidates.label: Project Candidates Pipeline
project_candidates.description: Scored internal candidate pipeline built from structured construction and capex signals.

global_intelligence.label: Global Intelligence Feed
global_intelligence.description: Curated major-project intelligence used to extend international coverage.

upstream_layers.label: Procurement / RFPs
upstream_layers.description: Bid and procurement demand that should become first-class sourcing intelligence.

upstream_layers.label: Equipment Rentals
upstream_layers.description: Rental-contract demand that signals public-sector heavy-equipment activity.

upstream_layers.label: Utility Certificates
upstream_layers.description: FERC and related utility infrastructure filings that point to grid buildout.

upstream_layers.label: Labor Demand
upstream_layers.description: Hiring and operator demand that can be mapped from state-level job activity.
